calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Vedica Puri, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
May Xiao, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff, May Xiao.
Attorney, Joseph Alcordo Sacramento, representing the plaintiff.

Defendants, Xuan Yang and Jack Watts, are present.
Attorney, Eli Sappler, representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 460 Davis Court, San Francisco, CA 94111. The trial date of November 3, 2008 is vacated.
